violations.description: Clean-in-place (CIP) equipment - Design and construction. — --Nonfood contact surface of clean in place equipment * was not cleaned properly. - Clean in place equipment requires more frequent cleaning.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. - Vent hood require cleaning.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)* were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. - Floors and walls dirty

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)* were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. - Floors and walls dirty. Floors behind CIP equipment dirty.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling * were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. - Progress has been made fixing the floors, still some areas that need attention to made the floors easily cleanable.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil * was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. - spoons for the soup stored at room temperature in between stirs and use. Utensils should be stored at a temp above 140*F or should be cleaned.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food * (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. - RTE food containers and reused containers need to be labeled with a date of prep and a use by date.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface * was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. - Wire shelf in the beer frig rusted. Glasses sit on the rusted area.

Clean-in-place (CIP) equipment - Design and construction. — --Nonfood contact surface of clean in place equipment * was not cleaned properly. - Microwave dirty. - CIP equipment dirty and requires detailed cleaning.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
